locator.quote: Add a dedicated "close open position on runner X at market" action. The env sizes the hedge using the formula above

text: A dedicated close-position action delegates hedge sizing to the env so the agent only picks whether/when, not the exact stake.

locator.quote: Agent cannot currently pick £41.67 as a stake

text: The pre-existing discrete stake head cannot select off-grid stakes like £41.67, so agent-driven closes were equal-stake by construction.
